events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "critical",
  "work_stage": "in-progress",
  "component_conditions": ["non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 50,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Workers directly under a suspended load",
    "No tag line controlling the suspended load",
    "No visible exclusion zone or barricading around the lift area",
    "Crane operator likely has obstructed view of personnel below"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Sound horn and immediately stop the lift, holding load in place",
    "Direct all personnel to clear the fall zone before any further movement",
    "Establish a hard barricaded exclusion zone equal to the fall radius of the load",
    "Use tag lines to control the load and keep ground personnel at a safe distance",
    "Verify crane operator's line of sight or assign a dedicated, positioned signal person",
    "Restart the lift only after all personnel are clear and exclusion zone confirmed"
  ],
  "rationale": "Working under a suspended load is a prohibited practice under OSHA 1926.1425. The severity is critical because any load drop or equipment failure will result in multiple fatalities. Immediate stop is required to remove all personnel from the fall zone before resuming with proper controls.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1926.1425 - Keeping clear of the load",
    "OSHA 1926.1400(c)(16) - Fall zone",
    "OSHA 1926.1424 - Work area control",
    "Standard crane hand signal chart and load chart for safe working radius"
  ]
}
